title: Audit log → events recorded for all system actions
evidence: All 13 TC-015 tests passed in 1965ms (354/354 total tests across 51 files): - ✓ ACCESS_DENIED — blocked user provision attempt → actor=system, tenant_id=null - ✓ ACCESS_GRANTED — POST /v1/admin/allowlist → actor=admin:tc015 - ✓ TENANT_PROVISIONED — successful provision → actor=system - ✓ TENANT_STARTED — start + pollUntilHealthy mock → actor=system, tenant ACTIVE - ✓ MESSAGE_DELIVERED — POST /message with mocked fetch → slackEventId in metadata - ✓ TENANT_STOPPED — POST /stop → actor=system - ✓ TENANT_DELETED — DELETE /tenant → actor=admin - ✓ ACCESS_REVOKED — DELETE /admin/allowlist/:id → actor=admin - ✓ GET /v1/admin/audit → all 8 event types present, total >= 8 - ✓ GET /v1/admin/audit?tenant_id=X → descending order confirmed - ✓ DELETE /PUT /PATCH /v1/admin/audit → all return 404 (append-only)
